slides.title: Switch 🔀

quizData.question: What happens if you omit `break` in a switch case?

options.text: Execution falls through to the next case.

quizData.explanation: Without `break`, execution continues into the next case (fall-through). Dart allows this but warns if you don't intend it.

slides.title: See it in Action
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use switch with enums for exhaustive handling

When switching on an enum, consider adding a `default` or handle all cases to avoid missing new enum values.
